modules.label: certificate
modules.tooltip: Create and manage certificates on the Hetzner Cloud.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: certificate
fields.description: Certificate and chain in PEM format, in order so that each record directly certifies the one preceding. Required if certificate does not exist and I(type=uploaded).

fields.label: domain names
fields.description: Domains and subdomains that should be contained in the Certificate issued by Let's Encrypt. Required if I(type=managed).

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the Hetzner Cloud certificate to manage. Only required if no certificate I(name) is given

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined labels (key-value pairs)

fields.label: name
fields.description: The Name of the Hetzner Cloud certificate to manage. Only required if no certificate I(id) is given or a certificate does not exist.

fields.label: private key
fields.description: Certificate key in PEM format. Required if certificate does not exist and I(type=uploaded).

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the certificate.

fields.label: type
fields.description: Choose between uploading a Certificate in PEM format or requesting a managed Let's Encrypt Certificate.

modules.label: certificate_info
modules.tooltip: Gather infos about your Hetzner Cloud certificates.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the certificate you want to get. The module will fail if the provided ID is invalid.

fields.label: label selector
fields.description: The label selector for the certificate you want to get.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The name of the certificate you want to get.

fields.label: algorithm
fields.description: Algorithm of the Load Balancer.

fields.label: api token

fields.label: delete protection
fields.description: Protect the Load Balancer for deletion.

fields.label: disable public interface
fields.description: Disables the public interface.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer to manage. Only required if no Load Balancer I(name) is given

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined labels (key-value pairs).

fields.label: load balancer type
fields.description: The Load Balancer Type of the Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer to manage. Required if Load Balancer does not exist.

fields.label: location
fields.description: Location of Load Balancer. Required if no I(network_zone) is given and Load Balancer does not exist.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The Name of the Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer to manage. Only required if no Load Balancer I(id) is given or a Load Balancer does not exist.

fields.label: network zone
fields.description: Network Zone of Load Balancer. Required of no I(location) is given and Load Balancer does not exist.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the Load Balancer.

fields.description: The IP the Load Balancer should have.

modules.label: load_balancer_service
modules.tooltip: Create and manage the services of cloud Load Balancers on the Hetzner Cloud.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: destination port
fields.description: The port traffic is forwarded to, i.e. the port the targets are listening and accepting connections on. Required if services does not exist and protocol is tcp.

fields.label: listen port
fields.description: The port the service listens on, i.e. the port users can connect to.

fields.label: load balancer
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer the service belongs to

fields.label: protocol
fields.description: Protocol of the service. Required if Load Balancer does not exist.

fields.label: proxyprotocol
fields.description: Enable the PROXY protocol.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the Load Balancer.

modules.label: load_balancer_target
modules.tooltip: Manage Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer targets

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: ip
fields.description: An IP from a Hetzner Dedicated Server, needs to belongs to the same user as the project. Required if I(type) is ip

fields.label: label selector
fields.description: A Label Selector that will be used to determine the targets dynamically Required if I(type) is label_selector

fields.label: load balancer
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer.

fields.label: server
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Server. Required if I(type) is server

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the load_balancer_network.

fields.label: type
fields.description: The type of the target.

fields.label: use private ip
fields.description: Route the traffic over the private IP of the Load Balancer through a Hetzner Cloud Network. Load Balancer needs to be attached to a network. See M(hetzner.hcloud.load_balancer_network)

modules.label: load_balancer_type_info

fields.label: api token

fields.label: dns ptr
fields.description: The DNS address the I(ip_address) should resolve to. Omit the param to reset the reverse DNS entry to the default value.

fields.label: floating ip
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Floating IP you want to add the reverse DNS entry to.

fields.label: ip address
fields.description: The IP address that should point to I(dns_ptr).

fields.label: load balancer
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer you want to add the reverse DNS entry to.

fields.label: primary ip
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Primary IP you want to add the reverse DNS entry to.

fields.label: server
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud server you want to add the reverse DNS entry to.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the reverse DNS entry.

modules.label: server
modules.tooltip: Create and manage cloud servers on the Hetzner Cloud.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: backups
fields.description: Enable or disable Backups for the given Server.

fields.label: datacenter
fields.description: B(Deprecated:) The O(datacenter) argument is deprecated and will be removed after 1 July 2026. Please use the O(location) argument instead. See https://docs.hetzner.cloud/changelog#2025-12-16-phasing-out-datacenters. Hetzner Cloud Datacenter (name or ID) to create the server in. Required if no O(location) is given and the server does not exist. Only used during the server creation.

fields.label: delete protection
fields.description: Protect the Server for deletion. Needs to be the same as O(rebuild_protection).

fields.label: enable ipv4
fields.description: Enables the public ipv4 address.

fields.label: enable ipv6
fields.description: Enables the public ipv6 address.

fields.label: firewalls
fields.description: List of Hetzner Cloud Firewalls (name or ID) that should be attached to the server.

fields.label: force
fields.description: Force the update of the server. May power off the server if update is applied.

fields.label: id
fields.description: ID of the Hetzner Cloud Server to manage. Only required if no server O(name) is given

fields.label: image
fields.description: Hetzner Cloud Image (name or ID) to create the server from. Required if server does not exist or when O(state=rebuild).

fields.label: image allow deprecated
fields.description: Allows the creation of servers with deprecated images.

fields.label: ipv4
fields.description: Hetzner Cloud Primary IPv4 (name or ID) to use. If omitted and O(enable_ipv4=true), a new ipv4 Primary IP will automatically be created.

fields.label: ipv6
fields.description: Hetzner Cloud Primary IPv6 (name or ID) to use. If omitted and O(enable_ipv6=true), a new ipv6 Primary IP will automatically be created.

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined labels (key-value pairs).

fields.label: location
fields.description: Hetzner Cloud Location (name or ID) to create the server in. Required if the server does not exist. Only used during the server creation.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the Hetzner Cloud Server to manage. Only required if no server O(id) is given or a server does not exist.

fields.label: placement group
fields.description: Hetzner Cloud Placement Group (name or ID) to create the server in.

fields.label: private networks
fields.description: List of Hetzner Cloud Networks (name or ID) the server should be attached to. If None, private networks are left as they are (e.g. if previously added by hcloud_server_network), if it has any other value (including []), only those networks are attached to the server.

fields.label: rebuild protection
fields.description: Protect the Server for rebuild. Needs to be the same as O(delete_protection).

fields.label: rescue mode
fields.description: Add the Hetzner rescue system type you want the server to be booted into.

fields.label: server type
fields.description: Hetzner Cloud Server Type (name or ID) of the server. Required if server does not exist.

fields.label: ssh keys
fields.description: List of Hetzner Cloud SSH Keys (name or ID) to create the server with. Only used during the server creation.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the server.

fields.label: upgrade disk
fields.description: Resize the disk size, when resizing a server. If you want to downgrade the server later, this value should be False.

fields.label: user data
fields.description: User Data to be passed to the server on creation. C(cloud-init), C(ignition) or similar provisioning tools may retrieve user configuration from the Server's C(user_data). Used during the server creation or server rebuild.

fields.label: volumes
fields.description: List of Hetzner Cloud Volumes (name or ID) that should be attached to the server. Only used during the server creation.

modules.label: server_info
modules.tooltip: Gather infos about your Hetzner Cloud servers.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the server you want to get. The module will fail if the provided ID is invalid.

fields.label: label selector
fields.description: The label selector for the server you want to get.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The name of the server you want to get.

modules.label: server_network
modules.tooltip: Manage the relationship between Hetzner Cloud Networks and servers

fields.label: alias ips
fields.description: Alias IPs the server has.

fields.label: api endpoint

modules.label: ssh_key
modules.tooltip: Create and manage ssh keys on the Hetzner Cloud.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: fingerprint
fields.description: The Fingerprint of the Hetzner Cloud ssh_key to manage. Only required if no ssh_key I(id) or I(name) is given.

fields.label: force
fields.description: Recreate the SSH Key if the public key does not match the one in the API.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the Hetzner Cloud ssh_key to manage. Only required if no ssh_key I(name) is given

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined labels (key-value pairs)

fields.label: name
fields.description: The Name of the Hetzner Cloud ssh_key to manage. Only required if no ssh_key I(id) is given or a ssh_key does not exist.

fields.label: public key
fields.description: The Public Key to add. Required if ssh_key does not exist.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the ssh_key.

modules.label: ssh_key_info
modules.tooltip: Gather infos about your Hetzner Cloud ssh_keys.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: fingerprint
fields.description: The fingerprint of the ssh key you want to get.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the ssh key you want to get. The module will fail if the provided ID is invalid.

fields.label: label selector
fields.description: The label selector for the ssh key you want to get.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The name of the ssh key you want to get.

fields.label: network
fields.description: The name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Networks.

fields.label: network zone

fields.label: state

modules.label: volume
modules.tooltip: Create and manage block Volume on the Hetzner Cloud.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: automount
fields.description: Automatically mount the Volume.

fields.label: delete protection
fields.description: Protect the Volume for deletion.

fields.label: format
fields.description: Automatically Format the volume on creation Can only be used in case the Volume does not exist.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the Hetzner Cloud Block Volume to manage. Only required if no volume I(name) is given

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined key-value pairs.

fields.label: location
fields.description: Location of the Hetzner Cloud Volume. Required if no I(server) is given and Volume does not exist.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The Name of the Hetzner Cloud Block Volume to manage. Only required if no volume I(id) is given or a volume does not exist.

fields.label: server
fields.description: Server Name the Volume should be assigned to. Required if no I(location) is given and Volume does not exist.

fields.label: size
fields.description: The size of the Block Volume in GB. Required if volume does not yet exists.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the Volume.

modules.label: volume_attachment
modules.tooltip: Manage the attachment of Hetzner Cloud Volumes

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: automount
fields.description: Automatically mount the Volume in the Server.

fields.label: server
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Server to attach the Volume to. Required if O(state=present).

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the Volume.

fields.label: volume
fields.description: Name or ID of the Hetzner Cloud Volume to attach/detach.

modules.label: volume_info
modules.tooltip: Gather infos about your Hetzner Cloud Volumes.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: id
fields.description: The ID of the Volume you want to get. The module will fail if the provided ID is invalid.

fields.label: label selector
fields.description: The label selector for the Volume you want to get.

fields.label: name
fields.description: The name of the Volume you want to get.

modules.label: zone
modules.tooltip: Create and manage DNS Zone on the Hetzner Cloud.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: delete protection
fields.description: Protect the Zone from deletion.

fields.label: id
fields.description: ID of the Zone to manage. Only required if no Zone O(name) is given.

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined key-value pairs.

fields.label: mode
fields.description: Mode of the Zone. Required if the Zone does not exist.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the Zone to manage. Only required if no Zone O(id) is given or the Zone does not exist. All names with well-known public suffixes (e.g. .de, .com, .co.uk) are supported. Subdomains are not supported. The name must be in lower case and must not end with a dot. Internationalized domain names must be transcribed to Punycode representation with ACE prefix, e.g. xn--mnchen-3ya.de (münchen.de).

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the Zone. C(import) is not idempotent.

fields.label: ttl
fields.description: TTL of the Zone.

fields.label: zonefile
fields.description: Zone file to import. Optional if O(state=present) and the Zone does not exist, ignored otherwise. Required if O(state=import).

modules.label: zone_info
modules.tooltip: Gather infos about your Hetzner Cloud Zones.

fields.label: api endpoint
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api endpoint hetzner
fields.description: The endpoint for the Hetzner API. You can also set this option by using the C(HETZNER_ENDPOINT) environment variable.

fields.label: api token
fields.description: The token for the Hetzner Cloud API. You can also set this option by using the C(HCLOUD_TOKEN) environment variable.

fields.label: id
fields.description: ID of the Zone you want to get. The module will fail if the provided ID is invalid.

fields.label: label selector
fields.description: Label selector to filter the Zones you want to get.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the Zone you want to get.

fields.label: change protection
fields.description: Protect the Zone RRSet from changes (deletion and updates).

fields.label: id
fields.description: ID of the Zone RRSet to manage. Only required if no Zone RRSet O(name) and O(type) are given.

fields.label: labels
fields.description: User-defined key-value pairs.

fields.label: name
fields.description: Name of the Zone RRSet to manage. Only required if no Zone RRSet O(id) is given or the Zone RRSet does not exist.

fields.label: state
fields.description: State of the Zone RRSet.

fields.label: ttl
fields.description: TTL of the Zone RRSet.

fields.label: type
fields.description: Type of the Zone RRSet to manage. Only required if no Zone RRSet O(id) is given or the Zone RRSet does not exist.

fields.label: zone
fields.description: Name or ID of the parent Zone.

modules.label: zone_rrset_info
modules.tooltip: Gather infos about your Hetzner Cloud Zone RRSets.
